extensionName.message: CopyTab - Copy Page Title and URL

extensionDescription.message: Quickly copy the current webpage's title and URL using a keyboard shortcut

subtitle.message: Quickly copy webpage title and URL

shortcutInfo.message: Press this shortcut on any webpage to copy title and URL

shortcutNote.message: 💡 Click the button above to open browser shortcut settings where you can customize the shortcut

selectFormat.message: Select the format for copied content

excludeSitesDesc.message: These websites will not trigger the copy function

wildcardExample.message: Example: https://*.google.com blocks all google subdomains

sitePlaceholder.message: Enter website URL or wildcard (e.g., https://*.example.com)

siteExists.message: This website is already in the excluded list

welcomeMessage.message: Please configure the shortcut first to use the copy function. Click the button below to set up Alt+C shortcut.

resetConfirmMessage.message: This will delete all custom configurations and restore to initial state. This action cannot be undone.
